title: annona senegalensis subsp. senegalensis
intro: Annona senegalensis subsp. senegalensis, also known as the African bush mango or Irvingia, is a plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Annona senegalensis subsp. senegalensis include weight loss, improved blood sugar control, and enhanced cardiovascular health, among others. The plant is commonly prepared as a powder, capsule, or extract, and can also be used in traditional herbal preparations such as teas and infusions.
